title: My email account on my Android phone is no longer receiving emails
creator: john1200
content: I have The Thunderbird email client on my Android phone. It worked for a while, but is no longer downloading emails. The only thing that shows is "Load 100 more" , but when I tap on it it does not load anymore emails.
metadata: ;useragent:Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10; K) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) SamsungBrowser/29.0 Chrome/136.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36;tb_version:17.0;os:Android

title: Can't authenticate Outlook email due to suspected webpage issue
creator: a3times7
content:
When trying to add my Outlook account, I am stuck at the authentication step. The webpage doesn't work. The screen recording I've attached is what happens on the second time and later; the first time it shows a different page (saying "The app named Thunderbird will be granted these permissions [... a list of permissions]; allow?" and I clicked "Allow") but it doesn't work either.

There is a "在 浏览器 浏览器中打开" option ("Open in browser browser" haha; it refers to Xiaomi system browser") but it opens a "Cannot find this page" error page. The "在 Edge 中运行" ("Run in Edge") button is unclickable.

Translation of the screen recording: Trying to log in to Thunderbird Android? Only continue if downloaded the app from trusted app store or website. [Cancel/Continue]

Screen recording at https://wwblo.lanzoub.com/itYge3mz8rlc (extract code: cnme)
metadata: ;useragent:Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10; K) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/144.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36 EdgA/144.0.0.0;tb_version:18.0b2;os:Android
